sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a cough, stating it's been persistent for the past three days. He also mentions feeling fatigued. The patient is taking cough medication as prescribed.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 118/72 mmHg. Heart rate is 78 bpm, regular. Lung auscultation reveals mild rhonchi in the right lower lobe. Temperature is 98.6°F.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient's presenting symptoms, along with the rhonchi, suggest a possible upper respiratory infection.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor recommends coricidin hbp for symptomatic relief. The doctor recommends cough medicine to manage the cough.
